title: euonymus alatus f. pilosus
intro: Euonymus alatus f. pilosus, also known as the burning bush or winged spindle, is a deciduous shrub native to East Asia, characterized by its winged branches and red or purple fruits. The medicinal properties of Euonymus alatus f. pilosus include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Euonymus alatus f. pilosus can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal remedies such as tinctures and ointments, and its seeds have been used to make a powder for medicinal purposes.
